channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Minneapolis will pay $600,000 to settle with woman who says ex-Officer Chauvin knelt on her neck
item.description: The city of Minneapolis has agreed to pay $600,000 to settle a lawsuit by a woman who alleged that ex-Officer Derek Chauvin hauled her from her minivan and pinned her to the ground with his knee in January 2020, just as he did four months later when he killed George Floyd.
item.dc:creator: Steve Karnowski, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: CBS agrees to hand over '60 Minutes' Harris interview transcripts to FCC
item.description: CBS says it will turn over an unedited transcript of its October interview with Kamala Harris to the Federal Communications Commission, part of President Donald Trump's ongoing fight with the network over how it handled a story about his opponent.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: With plans in the works and troops on the way, military assumes a mostly familiar role on the border
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Dozens of Marines unfurled coils of concertina wire — one on the ground and one slightly above — making it more difficult to climb a border wall separating Tijuana from San Diego.
item.dc:creator: ELLIOT SPAGAT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump says he ordered precision military strike against senior ISIS planner
item.description: President Trump said he ordered precision air strikes on Saturday morning targeting a "senior ISIS Attack planner" and others the unnamed individual recruited and led in Somalia.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Takeaways from the AP interview with Ukraine’s Zelenskyy
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — The Associated Press interviewed Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy on Saturday at a crucial juncture of the nearly three-year war against Russia’s full-scale invasion. U.S.
item.dc:creator: SUSIE BLANN, SAMYA KULLAB and ILLIA NOVIKOV, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Seven dead, 19 injured in air ambulance crash in Philadelphia
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A person in a car was the seventh fatal victim of the fiery crash of an air ambulance onto a busy Philadelphia street, authorities said Saturday, as investigators sifted through burned cars, damaged homes and charred debris for clues to determine why the aircraft plummeted shortl
item.dc:creator: MATT ROURKE and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Rubio is off to Central America with the Panama Canal and immigration top of mind
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Marco Rubio has embarked on his first foreign trip in office, heading to Central America on Saturday to press President Donald Trump's top priority — curbing illegal immigration — and bring the message that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Democrats elect Ken Martin, the party leader in Minnesota, as their national chair
item.description: OXON HILL, Md. (AP) — Democrats on Saturday elected Ken Martin, the party leader in Minnesota, as the national chair, turning to a low-profile Midwestern political operative to coordinate their resistance to Donald Trump’s presidency.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ken Martin elected next DNC chair
item.description: Minnesota state party chair Ken Martin was elected on Saturday as the next leader of the Democratic National Committee (DNC) after securing a majority of the 448 DNC committee members’ votes.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sister remembers Kansas man killed in DC plane crash
item.description: An El Dorado family is mourning the loss of 44-year-old Dustin Miller. He was one of the people onboard American Airlines Flight 5342 when it crashed Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Laura McMillan, NewsNation

item.title: Hershey isn't sure why Kisses are called 'Kisses'
item.description: Why isn't it called a Hershey’s Smooch or a Hershey’s Cone? Even the people at Hershey aren’t exactly sure.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Why Trump's meme coin is a cash grab
item.description: The coin – officially called $Trump – briefly ascended into the top 15 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization and attracted over a half-million buyers.
item.dc:creator: Maximilian Brichta Doctoral Student of Communication, University of Southern California, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With home prices and mortgage rates high, many families find the American dream out of reach
item.description: With home prices high, American families are grappling with the prospect that homeownership might remain out of reach for them for a long time.
item.dc:creator: R.J. Rico, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Colleges around the US cautiously navigate Trump's DEI crackdown
item.description: Around the United States, colleges and universities are cautiously navigating the Trump administration's crackdown on diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Maryclaire Dale, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: An air ambulance has crashed in Philadelphia. What to know about air medical transport
item.description: A medical transport jet carrying a child patient, her mother and four others slammed into a Philadelphia neighborhood and exploded in flames.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats call for reinstatement of IGs fired by Trump
item.description: The lawmakers said that Congress did not receive the 30-day notice or the reason for the IG’s removals which took place at over a dozen agencies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Trump administration fires prosecutors involved in Jan. 6 cases and moves toward ousting FBI agents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration on Friday fired a group of prosecutors involved in the Jan.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Medical plane carrying pediatric patient crashes in Philadelphia, sets homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet headed for Missouri and carrying two people and four crew members crashed in Northeast Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cartels authorized the use of weaponized drones against ICE agents
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection is taking threats seriously enough to circulate memos among agents.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Tour guide at former Colorado gold mine fell out of elevator after apparently not latching door
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A tour guide killed at a former Colorado gold mine last year fell out of a crowded elevator taking tourists below ground after apparently not latching its door closed, documents obtained by The Associated Press show.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Thousands of Costco workers prepare to strike with midnight contract deadline looming
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers prepared to strike with a midnight deadline drawing closer Friday while the worker's union and the company negotiated. The Teamsters union represents 18,000 Costco workers in six states: California, Washington, Maryland, Virginia, New Jersey and New York.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rats! More rodents are infesting cities as scientists say warmer temperatures mean more rat babies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rat infestation in many world cities appears to be soaring, especially in Washington, and a new study blames warming temperatures, urbanization and other human actions.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Michigan boy, 5, killed in hyperbaric oxygen chamber explosion, officials say
item.description: A 5-year-old boy is dead after a hyperbaric chamber he was inside exploded at a medical facility Friday in Troy, Michigan, police and fire officials said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 7-Eleven is giving away free Slurpees to celebrate the end of January
item.description: (KTLA) - January is finally coming to an end, and to celebrate people beating the “winter gloom,” 7-Eleven is giving away free Slurpees on Friday. Each customer can get only one free small Slurpee while supplies last.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2 arrested in Texas after kidnapping ‘TikTok prank’ near school
item.description: “The children immediately contacted their parents, who notified the Kyle Police Department,” KPD said.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: DC plane crash: Recovery continues, NTSB says investigation ongoing
item.description: Air crash investigations can take months, and federal investigators told reporters they would not speculate on the cause.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: What to know about the NTSB and the investigation into the DC plane crash
item.description: A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people brought renewed focus on the federal agency charged with investigating aviation disasters.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kash Patel grilled on potential Trump pressure, past comments at contentious hearing
item.description: Kash Patel, President Trump’s nominee to lead the FBI, was at the center of a contentious confirmation hearing Thursday, facing intense grilling from Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee about his past comments and allegiance to Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, NewsNation

item.title: Las Vegas judge sets bond for accused serial rapist at $1 million
item.description: In the first Las Vegas case, Billingsley pretended to be a rideshare driver, according to the Clark County District Attorney's office.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Murphy, NewsNation
